name: RightWay Auto Sales
description_short: RightWay Auto Sales is a used car dealership offering in-house auto financing for buyers with all credit types, including bad credit, no credit, and bankruptcy.
description_long:
RightWay Auto Sales is a used car dealership operating for 28 years with multiple locations across the nation. The Taylor, MI location is situated on Telegraph Road, one mile south of I-94 exit 202. The company positions itself as a top 5 used car dealer in the nation with an A+ BBB rating and 77,000+ customer reviews averaging 4.8 out of 5 stars.

RightWay offers used vehicles ranging from 2013 to 2024 models with inventory of hundreds of cars, trucks, and SUVs. Their primary service is auto financing through partnerships with 30+ lenders including banks, credit unions, and finance companies. Customers can apply online in 3 minutes with no immediate credit score impact, and approval extends to applicants with good credit, no credit, bad credit, bankruptcy history, and repossession records. Financing terms include options for $0 down payments and up to 84-month loan periods. Every vehicle purchase includes a 6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Additional services include trade-in/upgrade programs and vehicle appraisals.

RightWay distinguishes itself through accessibility across credit profiles, competitive financing terms from multiple lenders, same-day vehicle availability, and included warranty coverage. The company emphasizes hassle-free buying with no-pressure service and judgment-free treatment. Their marketing highlights affordable monthly payments tailored to customer budgets and income levels.

As a used car dealership offering financing rather than a traditional lending platform, RightWay functions as a retail auto finance provider. While they advertise flexible approvals and low down payments, customers should note that actual interest rates, loan terms, and monthly payments depend on credit profile and lender selection. The company's primary function is vehicle sales with integrated financing rather than standalone personal lending.
pros: Accepts applicants with all credit types including bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, and repossession history
Multiple financing partners (30+ banks, credit unions, finance companies) create competitive terms and rates
Low/no down payment options ($0 down available) reduce upfront cash requirements
Extended financing terms up to 84 months enable lower monthly payments
Every vehicle includes 6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance
Online application process takes 3 minutes with no immediate credit score impact
Same-day vehicle pickup available with hundreds of 2013-2024 model year inventory
A+ BBB rating with 77,000+ customer reviews averaging 4.8 out of 5 stars
cons: As a used car dealership, actual interest rates and final loan terms not disclosed on website—vary by credit profile and lender
Limited warranty coverage (6 months/6,000 miles) is shorter than typical new car warranties
Vehicle inventory limited to used models; no new car purchases available
Application approval does not guarantee loan funding; final approval dependent on lender selection and credit underwriting
best_for: Used car buyers with bad credit, no credit history, or recent bankruptcy seeking accessible auto financing
Customers wanting low/zero down payment options with flexible extended financing terms
Buyers prioritizing quick approval processes and same-day vehicle availability
diagnosis: RightWay Auto Sales is best for used car buyers with poor or no credit history seeking accessible, flexible auto financing with minimal down payment requirements. The main caveat is that actual interest rates and loan terms depend on credit profile and lender selection; the website advertises approval accessibility but does not disclose APRs or typical payment ranges.
services: Extended loan terms up to 84 months
